summary: Tested all footer quick links fix: (1) Contact page - heading, 4 contact cards (email/phone/whatsapp/office), message form working; (2) Support page - heading, 3 quick action cards, 6 FAQ accordion items working; (3) Privacy page - content with 7 sections displayed; (4) Terms page - content with 10 sections displayed; (5) All footer navigation links working: Browse Venues→/venues/search, How It Works→smooth scroll to #how-it-works, List Your Venue→/list-your-venue, Partner With Us→/partner; (6) All city links working: Delhi NCR, Mumbai, Bengaluru, Hyderabad→/venues/search?city=CityName; (7) Bottom Privacy Policy and Terms of Service links working; (8) Back buttons on all new pages work correctly. ALL 12 FEATURES TESTED PASS.
critical_code_review_comments: All footer links correctly use navigate() from React Router instead of <a href='#'>
How It Works link correctly scrolls to id='how-it-works' section on landing page
New pages (Contact, Support, Privacy, Terms) all have data-testid attributes for testing
Back button uses navigate(-1) for proper browser history navigation
All routes properly registered in App.js: /contact, /support, /privacy, /terms

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all 12 footer link features tested and working)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Footer links bug fix complete. All 4 new pages (Contact, Support, Privacy, Terms) are working. Key data-testids verified: footer-link-browse-venues, footer-link-how-it-works, footer-link-list-your-venue, footer-link-partner-with-us, footer-link-contact, footer-link-support, footer-link-privacy, footer-link-terms, footer-city-delhi-ncr, footer-city-mumbai, footer-city-bengaluru, footer-city-hyderabad, footer-privacy-policy, footer-terms-of-service, contact-heading, support-heading, privacy-content, terms-content, faq-list, back-btn. Console shows 401/429 errors for some API calls (likely auth-related) but these are unrelated to footer links functionality.
